raw_results.snippet: Source-domain: meal powder pressed to cake at 1.7 g/cc; broken to grains; sieved to F/C grades; finer grain = larger surface area = faster burn.
Source-domain: 30-300% power increase from corning; rate-of-energy-release controlled by grain size.
LLM-side: BatchLLM token batching at varying granularity; prefix-sharing groups.
LLM-side: HAMburger virtual-tokens granularity by single-KV cache representation.
